2603.20470.title: DiffGraph: An Automated Agent-driven Model Merging Framework for In-the-Wild Text-to-Image Generation
2603.20470.paper_summary: The rapid growth of the text-to-image (T2I) community has fostered a thriving online ecosystem of expert models, which are variants of pretrained diffusion models specialized for diverse generative abilities. Yet, existing model merging methods remain limited in fully leveraging abundant online expert resources and still struggle to meet diverse in-the-wild user needs. We present DiffGraph, a novel agent-driven graph-based model merging framework, which automatically harnesses online experts and flexibly merges them for diverse user needs. Our DiffGraph constructs a scalable graph and organizes ever-expanding online experts within it through node registration and calibration. Then, DiffGraph dynamically activates specific subgraphs based on user needs, enabling flexible combinations of different experts to achieve user-desired generation. Extensive experiments show the efficacy of our method.
2603.20470.paper_summary_zh: 文本到圖像（T2I）社群的快速成長促進了一個繁榮的在線專家模型生態系統，這些模型是專為多樣生成能力而設計的預訓練擴散模型的變體。<lb/>然而，現有的模型合併方法在充分利用豐富的在線專家資源方面仍然有限，並且仍然難以滿足多樣的實際用戶需求。<lb/>我們提出了DiffGraph，一個新穎的基於圖的模型合併框架，該框架由代理驅動，自動利用在線專家並靈活地將其合併以滿足多樣的用戶需求。<lb/>我們的DiffGraph構建了一個可擴展的圖，並通過節點註冊和校準組織不斷擴展的在線專家。<lb/>然後，DiffGraph根據用戶需求動態激活特定的子圖，實現不同專家的靈活組合，以達成用戶所期望的生成。<lb/>大量實驗顯示了我們方法的有效性。
2603.20470.author: Zhuoling Li et.al.
2603.20470.authors: Zhuoling Li, Hossein Rahmani, Jiarui Zhang, Yu Xue, Majid Mirmehdi, Jason Kuen, Jiuxiang Gu, Jun Liu
